ogTitle: Bilgola Beach vs Bilgola Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bilgola Beach and Bilgola Plateau.
heading: Bilgola Beach vs Bilgola Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bilgola Beach, New South Wales and Bilgola Plateau, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bilgola Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Bilgola Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bilgola Beach or Bilgola Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bilgola Beach has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Bilgola Plateau scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bilgola Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Bilgola Plateau scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bilgola Beach or Bilgola Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bilgola Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
